creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your submission.

The port is used by databases/rubygem-peek-mysql2 and www/redmine where redmine depends on Rails 4.
According to changes of mysql2 0.5.0, it has breaking changes and upstream asked Rails 4 users to pin mysql2 ~> 0.4.0.
Therefore, I would postpone this update unless it's needed by other ports.
